title: Why is sizeof returning 4 (or 8) for my array inside a function?
body: I am trying to get the size of an array inside a function to loop through it but it always returns 4 (or 8 on my 64-bit machine) instead of the actual number of elements.

title: How do I access struct members using a pointer?
body: I created a simple struct and a pointer to it but I get a compiler error when I try to access the variables using the dot . operator.

title: Why does my recursive factorial function cause a stack overflow?
body: I wrote a recursive function to calculate the factorial of a number but when I run it the program crashes with a stack overflow error.

title: fopen returns NULL when trying to open a text file in C++
body: I am using the C-style FILE* to open a file but fptr is always NULL. The file data.txt is in the same folder as my code.
